default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Semrush API integration and usage for fwd.digital's AI-powered content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital uses Semrush data extensively for client keyword research and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current manual process involves exporting data; aim is to fully automate via API](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Estimated API usage: 50-100 million credits/month, plus 15-20 user seats](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Budget target: \~$3,500/month (2% of current MRR), with room for growth](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Semrush team to prepare custom enterprise offer based on these requirements](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Business Model and API Needs

  - [AI-powered content marketing agency, launched 6 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [$2M ARR, 21 clients including Ramp, Hagen, prophecy.io](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Uses Semrush data for keyword gap analysis, domain overviews, and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Combines Semrush data with AI workflows for content strategy and creation](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Publishes \~20M words/month across clients](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Current Semrush Usage and Automation Goals

  - [Manually exporting data from Semrush UI, then processing in tools like Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Aim to fully automate via API for scalability (targeting 100+ clients)](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Key endpoints: Domain Overview, Keyword Gap Analysis](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Typical workflow: Compare client vs. 10 competitors, analyze \~50,000 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Cluster keywords by URL to identify content opportunities (e.g., 3,300 unique URLs from 50,000 keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### API Pricing and Credit Usage

  - [Domain Overview: 10 API units per domain lookup](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Keyword Gap: 80 API units per keyword returned](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Current manual process equivalent: \~4,000 API credits per client analysis](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Estimated monthly usage: 50-100 million API credits](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Seat Licenses and User Access

  - [Currently have 12 seats, need to expand to 15-20](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Adding roles like managing editors and SEO audit specialists](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Budget and Deal Structure

  - [Target: \~$3,500/month (2% of current $175k MRR)](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Seeking volume discount and flexibility for growth](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Open to annual commitment for better pricing](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kevin to prepare custom enterprise offer based on discussed requirements](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Marcel to consult with CTO regarding API integration plans and confirm needs](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Amber to present case to Semrush management for approval](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Team to aim for deal closure by Friday, before Amber's two-week leave](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Upon signing, fwd.digital to be assigned a dedicated customer success manager](https://fathom.video/share/8xwYC86nA1WLx_EMHsC3vciuxKSNAxs_?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
